description: (FAIL, _, GREEN) is forbidden: a FAIL Tier 1 forces fail-fast (§ 5 R3), so the behavioral tier never runs and t3 cannot be GREEN. A conformant implementation MUST reject this triple, not silently combine it.
why: § 6 R9 names (FAIL, _, GREEN) as unreachable; § 5 R3 fail-fast makes a GREEN behavioral tier after a Tier 1 floor miss a contradiction.
